response.justification: Wei Chen has strong full-stack development experience, including recent work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, which aligns well with the GenAI/cloud focus. However, their resume lacks direct evidence of building production-grade AI systems, vector databases, or RAG architectures. Their AI-related work appears limited to developer tooling rather than core AI solutions. The mismatch between their broad technical experience and the specialized AI/cloud requirements of the role lowers the overall fit.
strengths: Deep expertise in full-stack development with TypeScript and Node.js, including recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks
Demonstrated ability to lead technical projects and mentor teams (e.g., organizing workshops, setting up CI/CD pipelines)
Proven experience with cloud platforms (AWS CDK) and scalable systems (handling millions of requests in microservices environments)
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent systems in their recent work (despite some MCP tooling exposure)
Limited direct experience with production-grade AI solutions or AI system design (resume focuses more on general software development)
Master's/PhD in AI-related fields not listed; education is in Computer Science and Fine Arts/Computer Image Processing

key_factors.factor: AI system experience (vector DBs, RAG, multi-agent)
